description: 16-frame front-facing idle breathing loop for the player standing still. Micro movement only, fixed 608x1055 frame, bottom anchored.
style: HD anime front idle breathing spritesheet, transparent PNG, micro motion, fixed rectangular frames
prompt: Use the confirmed standing front pose as the idle state. Generate only subtle breathing: tiny chest/body expansion, no walking, no pose drift, no foot movement, no per-frame crop.

inputReferenceInvariant: static front standing pose is the not-moving player state; preserve character size, proportions, feet position, and center anchor across all 16 frames
adaptiveFramePolicy: same 608x1055 animation frame as other Wei Yang clips; do not clamp to per-frame content bbox

motionAmplitude.estimatedMaxPixelChange: about 1-2 px; alpha foot bottom remains locked to the same pixel row
